card_eligibility.source_phrase: If you have a Massachusetts address, you make the cut.
card_eligibility.source_block: If you have a Massachusetts address, you make the cut. If you don't have a library card, just visit our Circulation Desk. Library card signup takes 5 minutes or less and all you need is something verifying your name and address, like a driver's license or school ID. If you don't have something like that, don't stress, just give us a call and we can figure out what you do have that will work. If you can't wait another minute to check out our digital resources, you can get a digital library card online and get instant access to our Overdrive/Libby eBook, magazine, and digital audiobook collection. This eCard is only good for 6 months, so plan to drop by the library to convert your eCard to a fancy-schmancy physical card that never expires.
